Farmhouse 1

Farm 1 · 3-D pool-side look, luxury rooms, BBQ, games, and rooftop space

Updated with 3-D artwork and cement art on the swimming pool side. One of the most exciting farmhouse picnic options in Karachi.

Swimming3-D Pool

Big pool plus separate kids pool and open shower area.

Rooms3 Luxury

2 AC bedrooms plus 1 sitting area room.

BackupGenerator

Kitchen, freezer, dispenser and standby generator.

Farmhouse 2

Farm 2 · Newly constructed luxury farmhouse near Baqai University Road / Gadap Road

Location: Total 1.9 km away from main Highway Baqai University Road (Gadap Road). Location: 1st farmhouse of Gadap in starting.

Pool45×22 ft

Large pool, depth 3.5 to 6 ft, with artificial rain + baby pool.

PowerSolar + 2 Gen

Heavy solar system electricity and 2 standby generators.

TimingDay/Night

Morning, night, and day-night slots available.

Farm 2 Facilities

Newly constructed farmhouse with all luxury facilities

  • Newly constructed farmhouse with luxury facilities
  • 1.9 km away from main Highway Baqai University Road / Gadap Road
  • Heavy solar system electricity
  • Large pool: 45×22 ft, depth 3.5 to 6 ft, with artificial rain
  • Baby pool
  • 3 rooms with attached baths / 3 commodes
  • Optional AC charged separately
  • Changing area
  • Big lounge
  • Stylish kitchen
  • Dining table
  • Living room
  • Fridge
  • Pool chairs
  • Stylish BarBQ area with complete lighting
  • Patti, Dabbu, Snooker
  • Football ground
  • Long cricket pitch
  • Stylish sitting area in garden with complete lighting
  • Garden chairs available
  • Swings and round rides for kids in garden
  • 2 standby generators
  • Masjid for prayers, also for women
  • Complete high-quality lighting
  • Peaceful, pleasant, and fully secured
  • And much more

Morning: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
Night: 8:00 PM – 7:00 AM

Simple booking process

How to reserve your farmhouse

1

Send date

Message your date, slot, farmhouse number, and guest count.

2

Get quote

We confirm timing, rules, availability, and current price.

3

Pay advance

Reserve the farmhouse after confirming all details.

4

Enjoy

Arrive on your booked slot and enjoy the farmhouse.

📞

Bookings are almost full

Send farmhouse number, date, slot, guest count, and event type on WhatsApp. We will reply with availability and best price.

Book on WhatsApp
Questions before booking

FAQ

Are Farm 1 and Farm 2 separate?

Yes. Farmhouse 1 and Farmhouse 2 are separate listings with separate photos, videos, and facilities.

Is the pool private?

Yes, these are private farmhouse bookings. Confirm pool timing and rules on WhatsApp before payment.

What is the price?

Price depends on farmhouse number, date, day/night slot, guest count, and weekend demand. Message on WhatsApp for today’s best price.

How do I confirm booking?

After date and availability are confirmed, advance payment reserves your slot.

Ready to check availability?

Send one WhatsApp message and get Farm 1 or Farm 2 availability for your date.

Check My Date
Karachi Farmhouse Rentals · Farmhouse 1 and Farmhouse 2 · Replace WhatsApp number, exact prices, and exact location before ads.
